name: Hermes Gateway
summary: The live Telegram bot. One process serves several topic personas in the 'Concil of bots' forum group; each topic gets its own system prompt.
notes: Shares the Telegram bot token with claude-and-conquer, which is why that one stays stopped. Runs as uid 10000 — never docker exec as root. A chat must be in both TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_CHATS and TELEGRAM_GROUP_ALLOWED_CHATS in /opt/hermes-runtime/.env or its messages are dropped silently.
